task: Add a quota-ledger and billing boundary preview for the Pro Rust product core: define shared keyless quota ledger/billing boundary payloads, expose a read-only API endpoint, render a compact quota-ledger panel in the graph-first web shell, and synchronize Pro docs/evidence. Do not add payment provider integration, billing mutation, live provider calls, credential handling, auth enforcement, database/Redis/event-store connections, workers, OSS runtime changes, or package dependencies.
securityRequirements: Mention auth, secrets, permissions, and sensitive-data handling explicitly.
dependencyRequirements: Mention new or upgraded packages, lockfile changes, and dependency impact explicitly.
performanceRequirements: Mention performance, latency, or load impact in evidence.
understandingRequirements: Explain the main tradeoffs so future maintainers can follow the change.
continuityRequirements: Mention reuse targets and any deliberate continuity break in evidence.
